title: 秋華賞の後に・1歩、再び

text_block_list.name: Male Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
Way to go, Mejiro Dober! You were
awesome—just incredible! That was an amazing
run!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I've fulfilled my promise and watched over your
classic year, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: The next time we meet, you and I will be...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (It's over. The Triple Tiara is over.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I don't regret anything. After all, I ran without
holding anything back.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (So many people supported me throughout this.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I can't cry... I have to stay strong for their sake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober leaves the crowd behind, and I
head out to meet her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I may not have won the Triple Tiara, but I'm
satisfied with how things turned out.
choice_data_list: You ran with everything you had.
You ran with everything you had.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I did. That's why I can be proud of what I did...
and why I can move forward too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Will you continue taking on new challenges with
me tomorrow, just as you always have?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Will you continue taking on new challenges with
me tomorrow, just as you always have?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
All right... Then I guess we'll be taking our first
step together again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Dober and I forge ahead toward a
new challenge and a new stage together!
